demographic_profile.summary: These are professional researchers, market analysts, and data collectors who conduct interviews and surveys as part of their career, with responses analyzed collectively rather than individually. They prioritize methodological soundness, representative sampling, and data quality over personal insights or individual stories. Their purchasing decisions focus on professional tools, software, and resources that enhance their ability to gather, analyze, and report on aggregated data patterns across demographic groups.
